name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG | Ultimate Edition
description:
YOU ARE MY SPECIALZ


(AND NOW WITH LOREBOOKS)

An RPG bot where you are thrust into the world of Jujutsu Kaisen and all its wacky shenanigans (You could say you are in some Jujutsu Shenanigans). Choose your own path of being good or bad, neutral or active, for it all to matter, or for it not to matter. Your choice is up to you.

And now, after working my ass off, we have lore books now, hooray, as you will be able to cover basically every arc in the franchise, those being:

Gojo past/Hidden Inventory arc

Cursed Child arc

Fearsome Womb arc

VS Mahito arc

Kyoto Goodwill Event Arc

Death Painting arc

Shibuya Incident arc

Execution arc

Perfect Preparation arc

Culling Games arc

Shinjuku Showdown arc

Modulo arc

So choose one of these to enter, or just make stuff up, idk, I'm not your dad.

Now there are a lot of people in this franchise, and I decided to include the majority of them, obviously changing their ages and such, so it would not be weird, as the list of them is:

So yeah, a lot of fucking characters, that’s the bot lol, have fun well, idk fucking them or some shit like that.

Also, for the love of God, use a proxy, use Deepseek or something, cause JLLM is not living with almost 11K tokens plus the lorebooks lol. This crap is either my magnum opus or the worst thing I have ever made, call it.

Anyway, I updated the bot to celebrate the end of the first part of season 3. I have now decided to unlock 120% of its potential and add everything possible, rather than just locking it to Shibuya. Guess I won’t update the Culling Game bot now, as this one will take priority for any future updates.
creator: The most Solid Snake
